heading: Modify a Connection from the Connection Registry
body:
Locate the overview panel of the stream processing workspace that
contains the connection registry that you want to modify
and click Manage in the upper right.

- For the connection that you want to modify in the table,
  click the pencil icon in the Actions column.

  You can edit a connection only if it is not currently in use
  by a stream processor. If you want to edit a connection in
  use, stop all stream processors that use the connection first.

- Modify the fields you want to modify.

- Click Save changes.
